subcodes.first_line: O Mohsen! Upon thee be My glory! Verily, We have arisen this day, speaking in remembrance of thee and in remembrance of him who hath ascended unto God, the Lord of the Throne [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محسن علیک بهائی انا اصبحنا الیوم ناطقا بذکرک و ذکر من صعد الی الله رب العرش
